ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "hemisphere" INTEGER /* Hemisphere of the data */,
  "dist_code" INTEGER /* Distance code of the data */,
  "woy" INTEGER /* Week of the year (WOY) the data was collected */,
  "within_variation" REAL /* Within variation of the data */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error of the data */,
  "ci" REAL /* Confidence interval of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_dist_code FOREIGN KEY ("dist_code") REFERENCES distance_codes ("dist_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_hemisphere FOREIGN KEY ("hemisphere") REFERENCES hemispheres ("hemisphere_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_woy FOREIGN KEY ("woy") REFERENCES woys ("woy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Date and time the source was last contacted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hemispheres" (
  "hemisphere_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hemisphere */,
  "hemisphere_name" TEXT /* Name of the hemisphere */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hemisphere */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hemisphere_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_codes" (
  "dist_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance code */,
  "dist_code" TEXT /* Distance code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dist_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "woys" (
  "woy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week of the year */,
  "woy" INTEGER /* Week of the year (WOY) the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("woy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the access request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" REAL /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the visualization is based on */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization created */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization */,
  "visualization_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
